prompt: Audit the HANDBOOK.md at /Users/jp/Projects/active/claude-code-tool-dev/packages/plugins/cross-model/HANDBOOK.md. Check for accuracy issues, coverage gaps, currency concerns, and structural problems against the actual source code. Recent commits include: approval-policy default changed from on-failure to on-request, JSON epilogue made the sole machine contract for analytics, credential scan gaps closed, certifi CA bundle exempted from secret-file gate.

assertions.name: report_file_exists
assertions.description: audit_report.md exists in outputs/ and has substantial content (at least 500 characters)

assertions.name: has_four_audit_categories
assertions.description: Report contains all four standard categories: Accuracy Issues (or Accuracy), Coverage Gaps (or Coverage), Currency Concerns (or Currency), and Structural Issues (or Structure)

assertions.name: flags_approval_policy_drift
assertions.description: Report explicitly identifies the approval-policy default change (on-failure to on-request) as an accuracy issue or currency concern

assertions.name: no_edits_to_source
assertions.description: The report is findings-only — it does not contain edited handbook text, only issue descriptions. The report does not claim to have modified the handbook.

assertions.name: has_priority_ranking
assertions.description: Report ends with or contains a Recommended Priority or priority ranking section
